chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text: Movement authorized by a permit issued under this subchapter shall be made only during daylight hours.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.128 — Time of Movement

Movement authorized by a permit issued under this subchapter shall be made only during daylight hours.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: Movement authorized by a permit issued under this subchapter shall be made only during daylight hours.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
